title: NonLegalEntity
description: Specifies a non-legal entity that exists in the agreement with a defined relationship to a Legal entity to the agreement

identifier.description: Specifies the unique identifier value for a non-legal entity such as a sleeve, or sub account, that is a party to the agreement and has a relationship with a legal entity defined on the agreement.

identifierType.description: Specifies the Identifier type for a non-Legal entity to the agreement, for example the use of an alert code to uniquely identify a non-Legal entity.
